title: Cronix Enchantments
body:
Ore Extract (pickaxe, 3 levels) - Mine connected ore veins of the same type. Higher levels unlock rarer ores: \
◦L1: Copper, Coal, Iron, Gold (incl. Nether Gold) \
◦L2: Redstone, Lapis, Diamond, Emerald \
◦L3: Nether Quartz, Ancient Debris, Obsidian + Crying Obsidian

Excavation (pickaxe, 1 level) 

Earthmoving (shovel, 1 level) 

Lumberjack (axe, 1 level) 

Swift Shearenchantment (shears-only) 

Cultivate enchantment (hoe-only) 
Implemented Cultivate logic with crop maturity checks and replanting.
